sales_profit_ath.name: Sales @ ATH, Profit @ ATH, Price @ ATH/52WH
sales_profit_ath.description: Companies with sales and profit at all-time highs, price near ATH/52WH, low debt, low retail holding
sales_profit_ath.formula: Market Cap > 250 AND DE < 0.6 AND Retail Holding < 25 AND (Price Within 52WH < 25 OR Price Within ATH < 25) AND Quarterly Sales ATH AND Quarterly Profit ATH

smart_money_accumulation.name: Smart Money Accumulation
smart_money_accumulation.description: FII & DII increasing holdings, retail decreasing — smart money moving in
smart_money_accumulation.formula: FII Holding > FII Holding 1Q Back AND FII > 1 AND MCap > 500 AND DII > DII 1Q Back AND DII > 1 AND Retail < Retail 1Q Back

growth_near_high.name: Growth Companies @ near 25% 52WH/ATH
growth_near_high.description: Growing sales & profit, good margins, low debt, near highs
growth_near_high.formula: Sales Yearly > Sales 1yr Back AND NP Yearly > NP 1yr Back AND NPM > 9 AND ROCE > 12 AND MCap > 250 AND DE < 0.6 AND Retail < 25 AND (Within 52WH < 25 OR Within ATH < 25)

heavy_capex_near_high.name: Heavy CapEx Companies @ near 52WH/ATH
heavy_capex_near_high.description: Companies doing heavy capital expenditure, near price highs — capacity expansion plays
heavy_capex_near_high.formula: CapEx > CapEx 1yr Back * 1.2 AND CapEx/Sales > 0.05 AND MCap > 500 AND (Within 52WH < 25 OR Within ATH < 25) AND ROCE > 8

emerging_winners.name: Emerging Winners @ 52WH/ATH
emerging_winners.description: Consistent strong growth in sales/earnings, improving institutional ownership, turning profitable, financially healthy
emerging_winners.formula: ((Sales QoQ > 15% AND Sales YoY > 15% AND EPS QoQ > 15% AND EPS YoY > 15%) OR (Inst Holding Up AND Retail Down 10%+) OR (NP turning positive)) AND MCap > 400 AND DE < 0.8 AND PEG < 1.6 AND Near 52WH/ATH

blockbuster_earnings.name: Blockbuster Quarterly Earnings
blockbuster_earnings.description: Growth companies with improving earnings, rising sales, expanding margins, healthy cash & debt
blockbuster_earnings.formula: MCap 500-20000 AND EPS QoQ > 25% AND DE < 1 AND FCF/share > 0 AND Sales QoQ > 25% AND OPM improving

strong_fundamentals.name: Strong Fundamentals
strong_fundamentals.description: ROCE > 10, ROE > 10, low debt, consistent growth, positive FCF, good margins
strong_fundamentals.formula: ROCE > 10 AND ROE > 10 AND DE < 1 AND Sales 3yr CAGR > 10 AND NP 3yr CAGR > 10 AND CCC improving AND FCF Yield > 0 AND OPM > 10 AND NPM > 6

technofunda_growth.name: TechnoFunda Growth
technofunda_growth.description: Good quarterly growth in sales & operating profit with decent ROCE
technofunda_growth.formula: MCap > 400 AND Sales Growth Q YoY > 8 AND Sales Growth Q QoQ > 8 AND OP Growth Q YoY > 8 AND OP Growth Q QoQ > 8 AND ROCE > 8

sales_profit_ath.name: Sales @ ATH, Profit @ ATH, Price @ ATH/52WH
